title: Build a Full-Stack Multi-Agent App with Google ADK & Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform
summary: Build and deploy a full-stack multi-agent application with Google ADK - a React + FastAPI app on Cloud Run backed by a team of Gemini-powered agents on Gemini Enterprise Agent Runtime (formerly Vertex AI Agent Engine), covering SequentialAgent, LoopAgent, ParallelAgent, callbacks, artifacts, and memory.
